title: OLTS TrackingEvent
description: A normalized logistics tracking event. OLTS v0.2 draft.

eventTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit timezone offset (e.g. 2024-06-03T11:38:00+07:00). UTC (Z) is allowed but explicit offsets are preferred to preserve local context — many domestic Chinese carriers return timestamps without offset; consumers SHOULD attach the carrier's home timezone before persisting.

carrierCode.description: Slug identifying the carrier. SHOULD match the directory naming used in mappings/ (e.g. 'yto', 'sf', 'dhl').

carrierEventCode.description: Raw event/status code as returned by the carrier API (e.g. 'GOT', '01', 'opcode:100', 'DLVRD:ACCPT'). Look up its mapping in mappings/<region>/<carrier>.csv.

oltsCode.description: Normalized OLTS status code from the ULSC dictionary. MUST be one of the 32 codes in ulsc/ulsc.csv.

description.description: Human-readable event description. Either a single string or a multilingual object keyed by BCP 47 tag (e.g. {'zh': '...', 'en': '...'}).

name.description: Facility / network point name in local language (e.g. '上海浦东转运中心', 'Frankfurt Airport Hub').

location.description: Structured location of the event. All fields optional; provide what the carrier returns.

code.description: Operator / courier ID assigned by the carrier.

operator.description: The person who performed the operation (courier, signing party, etc.). Phone numbers SHOULD be masked when the carrier API masks them.

pieceId.description: Identifier of the specific piece within a multi-piece shipment. Omit for shipment-level events. DHL and UPS APIs expose per-piece tracking; domestic Chinese carriers usually don't.

vehicleNumber.description: Flight number / vessel name / truck plate / container number — whatever the carrier exposes.

operatingCarrier.description: Operating carrier identifier (airline IATA code, shipping line SCAC, etc.) for multi-leg shipments.

transport.description: Transport mode and conveyance details. Useful for cross-border / multimodal shipments; many domestic events leave this absent.

isLogicalEvent.description: true if the event is system-generated (derived status, polling artifact), false if it represents a physical scan. UPS exposes this as 'logicalScan' on activity records.

notes.description: Free-form additional context not captured in other fields (e.g. carrier-specific sub-reason, mapping decision rationale).

metadata.description: Carrier-specific extension fields. Consumers SHOULD treat as opaque unless they know the carrier's schema (e.g. EMS妥投代码细分, 顺丰 routeFrom/routeTo).

UlscCode.description: ULSC v0.1 dictionary — 32 codes across 7 categories. Authoritative source: ulsc/ulsc.csv.
